## Test plan

## Checklist

- [ ] Relative imports use `.js` extensions
- [ ] Type-only imports use `import type`
- [ ] No `console.log/warn/error` in library code (use `logger`)
- [ ] Error messages prefixed with `[module-id]` in plugins
- [ ] New files are kebab-case
